'''Shaki Hamachil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Science Outpost]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Equipment==
During her time at the [[Science Outpost]] on Dathomir, Hamachil [[Clothing/Legends|wore]] a [[Color/Legends|blue colored]] tight jacket and a pair of blue colored reinforced pants with [[Color/Legends|gray]] details. She also wore blue colored [[Padded armor/Legends|padded armor]] [[Boot/Legends|boots]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Shaki Hamachil was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
